posts.author: Sankalp
posts.text: Goldbees inav dip — Likely an iNAV feed refresh issue, the 9:59 value was probably based on delayed pricing and got corrected at 10:00 with live gold/USD-INR prices.

posts.author: WideCalls
posts.text: Goldbees inav dip — Hello, I noticed that the iNav of Goldbees etf dipped from 126.36 (at 9:59 am) to 125.19 (at 10 am). This is as per data seen here https://etf.nipponindiaim.com/ . What explains the sudden dip?
